title: Upload Application to Kelvin Platform
content:
# Upload Application to Kelvin Platform

Once you have finished writing and testing your new Import / Export Application, then you need to upload it to the App Registry on the Kelvin Platform.

When you create a new Connection, it will be listed as a selectable option.

**For Imports**

**For Exports**

To upload, you can follow the [Application Quick Start Guide for Upload](../../quick-start/how-to/upload-kelvin-smartapp.md).
summary: Once you have finished writing and testing your new Import / Export Application, then you need to upload it to the App Registry on the Kelvin Platform. When you create a new Connection, it will be listed as a selectable option.
